tools.name: get_subledger_holdings
tools.description: Return custody/sub-ledger holdings for a fund (the custody side of a recon).

tools.name: get_pending_settlements
tools.description: Return trades executed but not yet settled as of the date (timing-break evidence).

tools.name: get_fx_rates
tools.description: Return GL vs custody FX rates for a date (FX-rounding-break evidence).

tools.name: get_tolerance_policy
tools.description: Return the reconciliation tolerance policy (what counts as a break).
